name: Business Statistics
summary: A comprehensive course covering business statistics including descriptive statistics, probability, inferential statistics, regression analysis, and hypothesis testing. Taught by Prof. Mostafa Elhosseini.

name: MS SQL Server Programming
summary: Deep dive into MS SQL Server including writing queries, stored procedures, and managing enterprise data. Taught by Hagar Ibrahiem.

name: Data Visualization by Power BI
summary: Learn to build professional dashboards with Power BI, covering data modeling, DAX formulas, and interactive visualizations. Taught by Eman Raslan.

name: Network and Security Fundamentals
summary: Covers network security fundamentals including the OSI model, subnetting, firewalls, and core security concepts. Taught by Ahmed Shalaby.

name: HTML
summary: A complete course on HTML covering structure, elements, forms, semantic HTML, and best practices for building web pages. Taught by Mohamed Ali.

name: Fundamentals of Graphic Design
summary: Introduction to graphic design fundamentals covering design principles, color theory, typography, and layout. Taught by Heba Hashem Abdeen.

name: Microsoft Windows Active Directory
summary: Comprehensive training on Windows Active Directory including Group Policy Objects (GPO), user management, and enterprise directory services. Taught by Abdelbaky Shehata.

name: Linux Fundamentals
summary: Covers Linux command line interface (CLI), file system navigation, permissions, shell scripting, and system administration basics. Taught by Yehia Kandeel.

name: Splunk SIEM Case Studies
summary: Advanced Splunk SIEM training through real-world case studies, covering SPL queries, dashboards, and security event analysis. Taught by Motasem Hamdan.
prerequisites: Basic knowledge of SIEM and Splunk

name: How AI & Chat GPT Work
summary: An introductory course explaining how Artificial Intelligence and ChatGPT work, covering AI fundamentals, language models, and practical AI applications. Taught by Mohammad Thabet.

name: Introduction to JavaScript
summary: Fundamentals of JavaScript programming language covering variables, functions, DOM manipulation, events, and modern ES6+ features. Taught by Mohamed Ali.

name: Introduction to TypeScript
summary: Learn TypeScript fundamentals including types, interfaces, generics, and how to build type-safe JavaScript applications. Taught by Ahmed Saber.

name: Introduction to Marketing
summary: An introductory course covering marketing fundamentals, digital marketing strategies, and marketing principles. Taught by Walid Saed.

name: Career Planning
summary: A short course on career planning covering CV writing, interview preparation, and career path strategies. Taught by Mariam Elgaby.

name: Python Basics for Data Science
summary: Deep dive into Python programming for data science including data structures, OOP concepts, and working with libraries like Pandas and NumPy.

name: Data Analysis Using Python for Data Science
summary: Learn data cleaning, scraping, and analysis using Python with Pandas and NumPy. Covers real-world data analysis workflows.

name: Machine Learning and Predictive Modeling for Data Science
summary: Build predictive models using Supervised and Unsupervised learning, Neural Networks, and Regression algorithms for data science applications.

name: Introduction to Data Science
summary: Introduction to the field of data science covering key concepts, tools, and career paths. Taught by Osama Salem (CEO of Etica Technology).

name: Advanced Excel for Data Science
summary: Advanced Excel skills including Pivot Tables, DAX formulas, and Power Query for data analysis and business intelligence.

name: Data Science Career Development
summary: Professional skills module covering CV writing, interview simulations, and career path planning specifically for data science careers.

name: Data Science Career Center
summary: Career center resources and guidance for data science professionals including portfolio building and job placement support.

name: Final Project for Data Science
summary: Capstone project for the Data Science track where students solve real business problems and build their professional portfolio.
prerequisites: Completion of Data Science track courses

name: Live Session - All About Data Science
summary: Live interactive sessions covering all aspects of data science. 9 videos, 3 hours 19 minutes of content. Taught by Osama Salem.

name: Introduction to SOC Analysis and Management
summary: Introduction to Security Operations Center analysis and management, covering the Cyber Kill Chain, Incident Response lifecycles, and defensive operations.

name: Splunk SIEM
summary: Deep dive into Splunk SIEM covering SPL queries, dashboards, security event correlation, and alerting for Security Operations Centers.

name: IBM QRadar
summary: Comprehensive IBM QRadar training covering AQL queries, offense management, and SIEM operations for enterprise security monitoring.

name: CSS
summary: Complete CSS course covering selectors, layout (Flexbox, Grid), responsive design, animations, and modern CSS techniques.

name: ECMAScript and Modern JavaScript
summary: Advanced JavaScript covering ES6+ features including arrow functions, destructuring, async/await, modules, and modern development patterns.

name: Introduction to Object Oriented Programming (OOP) using C#
summary: Learn OOP principles using C# including classes, inheritance, polymorphism, interfaces, and design patterns.

name: Fundamentals of Database for .NET Full Stack Development
summary: Database fundamentals for .NET developers covering relational database design, Entity Framework, and database operations.

name: Fundamentals of Motion Graphics
summary: Introduction to motion graphics covering animation principles, After Effects basics, and creating animated compositions.

name: CapCut Video Editing
summary: Learn video editing using CapCut including cutting, transitions, effects, text overlays, and exporting professional videos.

name: Python Basics for Data Analysis
summary: Python programming fundamentals tailored for data analysis, covering data structures, libraries, and practical data manipulation.

name: Introduction to Data Analysis
summary: Introduction to data analysis concepts, methodologies, and tools used in the field.

name: Data Analysis Using Python
summary: Practical data analysis using Python with Pandas and NumPy, covering data cleaning, transformation, and exploratory data analysis.

name: Final Project for Data Analysis
summary: Capstone project for the Data Analysis track where students apply their skills to solve real business analysis problems.
prerequisites: Completion of Data Analysis track courses

name: Artificial Intelligence Tools
summary: Exploration of modern AI tools and platforms, covering practical applications of AI technologies in various domains.

name: Python Basics for AI
summary: Python programming fundamentals tailored for AI development, covering essential libraries and programming patterns used in AI.

name: SOC Tips
summary: 35 short videos with tips and tricks for Security Operations Center analysts. Covers monitoring, analysis techniques, and best practices.

name: Programming Tips
summary: 30 short videos covering programming tips, tricks, and best practices including HTML, CSS, and JavaScript tips.

name: AI Tips
summary: 5 short videos covering tips on AI tools and concepts including practical applications of AI and ChatGPT.

name: Data Science Tips
summary: 4 short videos covering data science tips including Excel for data analysis and statistics fundamentals.

name: General Courses Tips
summary: 4 short videos covering general educational tips including marketing introduction tips.

name: QRadar Professional Pathway Tips
summary: 6 short videos covering QRadar SIEM tips and professional pathway guidance. Taught by Hatem Metwally.

name: Network and Security Fundamentals Tips
summary: 7 short videos covering network and security fundamentals tips. Taught by Ahmed Shalaby.

name: HTML Tips
summary: 8 short videos covering HTML tips and best practices. Taught by Mohamed Ali.

name: Free Sessions
summary: 45 free live sessions on various topics including data science, career development, and technology trends. 12 hours 5 minutes of content.

name: Live Session - SOC
summary: Live interactive session covering SOC analysis topics, tools, and practical security scenarios.
